pageDescription: Get push notifications when your residence status expiration date is approaching. Customize the notification timing below.

permission.title: Allow Notifications
permission.description: Please allow device notifications so you don't miss important deadlines. You can change this anytime in settings.
permission.deniedMessage: To enable notifications, please allow them in your device settings.

timing.sectionSubtitle: Choose when to receive notifications before expiration

infoBox: Visa renewal applications can be submitted approximately 4 months before the expiration date. We recommend preparing early.

preview.title: Notification Preview
preview.notificationTitle: Your visa renewal application period has started
preview.notificationBody: 120 days remaining until your residence status expires. Please start preparing the required documents.

otherSettings.badgeDescription: Show notification count on app icon

accessibility.allowNotificationHint: Tap to request device notification permission
accessibility.fourMonthsHint: Turn on to receive a notification 4 months before
accessibility.threeMonthsHint: Turn on to receive a notification 3 months before
accessibility.oneMonthHint: Turn on to receive a notification 1 month before
accessibility.twoWeeksHint: Turn on to receive a notification 2 weeks before
accessibility.soundHint: Turn on to play sound when notified
accessibility.badgeHint: Turn on to show notification count on app icon
